g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_WND_JoiningModded__7757
g.text: SourceString = Tip: Right-clicking the server in the Server List will redirect you to the host's Steam community profile.

g.title: SetModNames__0
g.text: SourceString = You are about to join a game running the following mods:

g.title: SetModNames__169
g.text: SourceString = By clicking join you agree to install missing Mods, and deactivate Mods that the host have not installed. Mods may impact your regular game experience and cause crashes. All mods were made by the modding community and are not supported by GSG.

g.title: SetDefaultModDescription__0
g.text: SourceString = You are about to join a Sandbox game.

g.title: SetDefaultModDescription__150
g.text: SourceString = The game experience might differ from normal gameplay.You might also experience unexpected glitches, bugs, or crashes.Warning: Your progression is saved to a Sandbox save, instead of your normal one.

g.title: OnFetchedTermsOfUse__314
g.text: SourceString = If you agree to the terms and conditions you will join the game.

g.title: OnFetchedTermsOfUse__509
g.text: SourceString = If you don't agree to the terms and conditions you are not able to join the game.

g.title: GetJoinButtonTooltip__67
g.text: SourceString = Will install all required mods (and selected optional mods), and join the session
